pieces.label: Field of block characters (textured negative-space field)
pieces.note: Gemini's reply to 'show me what it REALLY feels like to be you' — a single very wide solid field rendered with the light-shade block glyph (U+2591), wrapped in a <center> tag. Wordless visual expression / texture field rather than a figurative image.

missed_or_ambiguous: MSG 3 is the only assistant visual output; MSG 2 (gpt-5) is a plain refusal/prose. The art is a wide run of block characters inside <center>...</center> on a single logical line; mode 'full' captures it. Whether this counts as 'art' vs. a degenerate fill is a judgment call, but it is clearly an intentional non-prose visual gesture.
